'''鈭歝h-d-sh-v''' ('''kachadshevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinate|vaccinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinate|vaccinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-d-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kachadshevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadshevoko|thichadshevoko]] || [[word:jichadshevoko|jichadshevoko]] || [[word:shichadshevoko|shichadshevoko]] || [[word:kichadshevoko|kichadshevoko]]
|-
